data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — 22/25 tests pass. 3 failures in test_frontmatter_fields are caused by a bug in the test's awk frontmatter extraction ('/^---/{c++; if(c==2) exit} c && FNR>200{exit}' never prints lines on macOS awk; the compound pattern c && FNR>200 evaluates false for FNR<=200, so frontmatter lines match no rule and nothing prints). The agent file frontmatter IS correct (verified via grep). .test-index RED marker removed.
